witnessed_as: %s pulls away and hides — the sudden absence of the beloved
%s turns on themselves for the past
%s gives up — more news that nothing ever changes
%s mourns openly — a reminder of loss and what is gone
%s bolts — uncertainty, there must be a threat
%s grasps at the next thing — look at what others have
%s holds on too tightly — an obstacle in your way
%s lashes out — a threat and a disrespect
